item.tcompat.glaive.description: The Glaive is a high reach, large radius polearm. Good for crowd control and long distance targets.
material.tcompat.aether_wood.flavor: I thought we had skyroot already.
material.tcompat.black_steel.flavor: Why do they all end with 'gr'?
material.tcompat.cursium.flavor: I've got friends on the other side.
material.tcompat.deathworm_chitin.flavor: It's got me! It's got me!
material.tcompat.draculite.flavor: I vant to suck your blood.
material.tcompat.fire_dragon_scale.flavo: Comes in (almost) all colors of the rainbow!
material.tcompat.golden_vine.flavor: I can't believe it's not gold.
material.tcompat.hydra_fang.flavor: Saps the life right outta ya!
material.tcompat.ice_dragon_scale.flavor: Comes in (almost) all colors of the rainbow!
Comes in (almost) all colors of the rainbow!
material.tcompat.lightnum.flavor: An unknown alloy from long ago.
material.tcompat.malignant_pewter.flavor: Are you certain whatever you're doing is worth it?
material.tcompat.ostrum.flavor: Like netherite except it really isn't.
material.tcompat.pyral.flavor: From the ash it rises and to the ash it will one day return.
material.tcompat.refined_sentrite.flavor: Also makes a nice set of bricks.
material.tcompat.sea_serpent_scale.flavo: Torn from a fish that likes to be on land.
material.tcompat.soul_stained_steel.flav: Are you telling me, a soul stained this steel?
material.tcompat.soulstone.flavor: No, this isn't an infinity stone.
material.tcompat.spirit_fabric.flavor: I'm here to buy your strongest potions.
material.tcompat.thallasium.flavor: Some people have a phobia of it.
material.tcompat.valkyrum.flavor: The secrets of refining Valkyrum is a well guarded one.
modifier.tcompat.aether_forged.descripti: Allows your tool to use it's full effectiveness in The Aether.
modifier.tcompat.allythropod.description: Bonus damage to non-arthropods and deathworms
modifier.tcompat.ambrofusion.description: Tool can have it's stats buffed with Ambrosium but durability depletes faster.
modifier.tcompat.ambrogen.description: Small chance to dislodge Ambrosium from broken blocks.
modifier.tcompat.amphitheric.description: Knocks all mobs back with the power of an amphithere's wings
modifier.tcompat.aqua_shot.description: Does extra damage when shooter is wet
modifier.tcompat.aquatic.description: Your tool stats are buffed based on the amount of aquatic creatures nearby.
modifier.tcompat.archaeologist.descripti: Bonus damage and protection against ancient remnants.
modifier.tcompat.ascension.description: Interacting with a block will cause it to ascend to a higher plane.
modifier.tcompat.auric_flame.description: Charge up and launch a volley of auric flame bolts.
modifier.tcompat.blighted.description: Hitting targets inflicts them with Inebriation
modifier.tcompat.breathless.description: Increased protection from dragon breath attacks.
modifier.tcompat.brightness.description: Pushes away the dark fog brought on by the warden's presence.
modifier.tcompat.cataclysmic.description: The spirits of ancient gods try to hold your tool together.
modifier.tcompat.certainty.description: A successful slaughter will sometimes double the force of the next swing.
modifier.tcompat.dampening.description: Deals extra damage to mystical creatures.
modifier.tcompat.deliverance.description: Deal a weakened attack in order for your next attack to be doubled
modifier.tcompat.dreadbane.description: Deals extra damage to Dread Creatures.
modifier.tcompat.erosion.description: Charge up and launch draining bolts.
modifier.tcompat.erosion.flavor: You probably learned about this in geography class
modifier.tcompat.escarstay.description: Large flat increase in knockback resistance.
modifier.tcompat.flamed.flavor: Burns with the fires of hell!
modifier.tcompat.fluxed.description: Fully charged shots fire a heavy-duty Wither Rocket.
modifier.tcompat.frost_thorns.flavor: Freezes the blood in your veins!
modifier.tcompat.frostborn.description: Bonus damage against other dragon types and bonus protection against Ice Dragons.
modifier.tcompat.ghostly.description: Small chance to completely ignore an incoming attack. Chance increases if the attack is a projectile.
modifier.tcompat.hallowed.description: Adds one bonus Rune slot to the tool.
modifier.tcompat.heartbeat.description: Something within the tool occasionally beats.
modifier.tcompat.iced.flavor: Freezes the blood in your veins!
modifier.tcompat.ignitium.description: Ignis' rage fills your armor, strengthening stats and providing special abilities.
modifier.tcompat.leeching.description: Poisons and leeches life from target
modifier.tcompat.lightning.flavor: Strikes with the power of the gods!
modifier.tcompat.magic_proficiency.descr: Increases Magic Proficiency, and, in turn, magic damage.
modifier.tcompat.magic_proficiency.flavo: My potions are too strong for you, traveller...
modifier.tcompat.mnemonic.description: Charge up and launch hexed bolts.
modifier.tcompat.mnemonic.flavor: Gonna cast a spell on you
modifier.tcompat.obsidian_breaker.descri: Increased mining speed against obsidian and similar blocks.
modifier.tcompat.oxygenated.description: Using the tool replenishes air by consuming Oxygen.
modifier.tcompat.petrifying.description: The troll's hide petrifies in sunlight, strengthening your tool
modifier.tcompat.phantasmic.description: Shooting an arrow summons three phantom arrows.
modifier.tcompat.phoenix_touched.descrip: Launched projectiles are lit with an immortal flame.
modifier.tcompat.ricoshield.description: Lower your shield to release a burst of absorbed damage.
modifier.tcompat.rubys_fire.description: Causes targets to ignite and drops to be blasted.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_culling.descrip: Increased Magic Proficiency and Spell Power.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_haste.descripti: Your tools are bolstered with radiance, increasing your mining and attack speed.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_loyalty.descrip: You reach out for further power, increasing your reach and item pickup distance.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_motion.descript: The zephyr propels you forward, increasing your movement speed.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_reinforcement.d: Increased Soul Ward Capacity and Integrity.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_spell_mastery.d: Bonus Staff Charges, increased Magic Proficiency and Spell Power.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_the_aether.desc: The heavens call for you, increasing jump height and decreasing gravity.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_the_arena.descr: Your fists and tools are reinforced with earth, increasing your strength.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_the_hells.descr: The warm embrace of fire coats your soul, mending your seared scars.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_the_seas.descri: Let any fish who meets my gaze learn the true meaning of fear; for I am the harbinger of death. The bane of creatures sub-aqueous, my rod is true and unwavering as I cast into the aquatic abyss. A man, scorned by this uncaring Earth, finds solace in the sea. My only friend, the worm upon my hook. Wriggling, writhing, struggling to surmount the mortal pointlessness that permeates this barren world. I am alone. I am empty. And yet, I fish.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_unnatural_stami: Increased speed and sprinting is always available
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_volatile_distor: Critical Strikes and Erratic Damage Output.
modifier.tcompat.rune_of_warding.descrip: An earthen carapace surrounds your body, functioning as extra armor.
modifier.tcompat.runic.description: Adds one bonus Rune slot to the tool.
modifier.tcompat.scorch_thorns.flavor: Burns with the fires of hell!
modifier.tcompat.scorchborn.description: Bonus damage against other dragon types and bonus protection against Fire Dragons.
modifier.tcompat.sonorous.description: Charge up and release a sonic boom.
modifier.tcompat.stymphalian.description: The metallic fletching enables the arrow to soar like a bird
modifier.tcompat.swapping.description: Struck targets will switch places with the shooter.
modifier.tcompat.thunderstruck.descripti: Charged attacks smite targets with lightning.
modifier.tcompat.tidal.description: When used while sneaking, it summons Waves in a Fan pattern.
modifier.tcompat.tide_guardian.descripti: Water Breathing and increased strength when wet.
modifier.tcompat.void_scatter.descriptio: Upon hitting a target, the arrow shatters into multiple void shards.
modifier.tcompat.void_touched.descriptio:
Increased efficiency against end stone blocks.
Applies a stacking damage multiplier to targets.
modifier.tcompat.volt_thorns.flavor: Strikes with the power of the gods!
modifier.tcompat.voltborn.description: Bonus damage against other dragon types and bonus protection against Lightning Dragons.
modifier.tcompat.warded.description: Increased Soul Ward capacity and recovery rate.
modifier.tcompat.warden.description: Utilise the power of the Warden to dampen vibrations and make the tool stronger.
modifier.tcompat.wicked.description: Inflict targets with a stacking Combustion effect.
recipe.tcompat.modifier.dampening.level_: Dampening requires a different recipe for the first level.
Dampening requires a different recipe for the first two levels.
recipe.tconstruct.ambrofusion.at_capacit: Tool has no more space for ambrosium
